span.p:
Notification sent to manager.
SLA timer starts for approval.
Leave balance tentatively reserved.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Leave balance deducted.
Team calendar updated.
Payroll notified for LOP if unpaid.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Leave balance restored.
Team calendar updated.
Cancellation reason logged.
